questions.text: Over the past week, on average, how would you rate your neck pain?
Over the past week, how much has your neck pain interfered with your daily activities (housework, washing, dressing, lifting, reading, driving)?
Over the past week, how much has your neck pain interfered with your ability to take part in recreational, social, and family activities?
Over the past week, how anxious (tense, uptight, irritable, difficulty in concentrating/relaxing) have you been feeling?
Over the past week, how depressed (down-in-the-dumps, sad, in low spirits, pessimistic, unhappy) have you been feeling?
Over the past week, how have you felt your work (both inside and outside the home) has affected (or would affect) your neck pain?
Over the past week, how much have you been able to control (reduce/help) your neck pain on your own?
